items.label: storefront-dev
messages: Files already exist. Let me examine them to see if they're complete or stubs.
Good — the implementation already exists. Let me run the unit tests to validate everything passes.
All 26 tests pass. Now let me validate the dev server compiles correctly.
Dev server returns HTTP 200 — webpack resolves all modules correctly. Now let me check if there's a validation hook file to update, then commit and complete the pipeline.
The Quick View feature doesn't add new routes (it's an overlay on existing PLP tiles), so no validation hook update needed. Let me check the SSR safety checklist items and then commit.
The implementation is already committed. All tests pass (26/26), dev server returns HTTP 200. Let me now complete the pipeline.

The **storefront-dev** phase for **product-quick-view** is complete. Here's a summary:  ## Implementation Summary  ### Files Delivered (already committed in `d012578`) | File | Purpose | |---|---| | `overrides/app/components/product-tile/index.jsx` | ProductTile override — wraps base tile with Quick View overlay bar (slide-up on hover desktop, always visible mobile) | | `overrides/app/components/product-tile/index.test.js` | 12 unit tests: overlay bar rendering, interaction (preventDefault/stopPropagation), set/bundle exclusion, visual states | | `overrides/app/components/quick-view-modal/index.jsx` | QuickViewModal — Chakra Modal → `useProductViewModal` → `ProductView` with loading spinner, error state, and full product details | | `overrides/app/components/quick-view-modal/index.test.js` | 14 unit tests: modal shell, content rendering, error state, accessibility (aria-label, Escape key) |  ### Verification Results - ✅ **26/26 unit tests pass** (100% statement/line coverage) - ✅ **Dev server HTTP 200** — webpack resolves all override modules correctly - ✅ **SSR safe** — no `window`/`document` references without guards - ✅ **E2E safe** — no `networkidle` patterns - ✅ **Roam tools unavailable** (MCP security policy denied) — used standard tools for validation

items.label: storefront-unit-test
messages: Now let me explore the actual source files that were created and the test infrastructure.
Good - test files already exist. Let me read the source components and existing test files.
Good - both source components and test files exist. Let me run the tests now to see if they pass.

All 26 tests pass across both test suites with excellent coverage (100% statements, 100% lines, 100% functions). There are console warnings about missing translations but those don't affect test outcomes.  Let me check the coverage gap — branch coverage for product-tile is 75% on line 28. Let me see what that branch is.
The branch coverage gap is on line 28 where `productName` is computed with fallbacks. Let me add tests to cover those branches and improve quality.
Now let me run the tests again to verify everything passes with the new tests:
All 28 tests pass with **100% coverage** across all metrics (statements, branches, functions, lines). Now let me commit and complete the pipeline.

The **storefront-unit-test** phase for **product-quick-view** is complete. Here's a summary:  ## Results  ### Test Coverage: 100% across all metrics  | File | Statements | Branches | Functions | Lines | |---|---|---|---|---| | `product-tile/index.jsx` | 100% | 100% | 100% | 100% | | `quick-view-modal/index.jsx` | 100% | 100% | 100% | 100% |  ### Test Suites: 2 passed, 28 total tests  **QuickViewModal (`index.test.js`) — 14 tests:** - Modal shell: loading spinner, ProductView rendering, data-testid, aria-label, closed state - Content integration: product data pass-through, "View Full Details" link, Add to Cart button, prop forwarding - Error handling: unavailable product error state - Accessibility: Escape key closes modal, aria-label fallback for missing product names  **ProductTile override (`index.test.js`) — 14 tests:** - Overlay bar rendering: standard product, eye icon + text, correct aria-label - Exclusions: product sets, bundles, missing productId all correctly hidden - Interaction: click opens modal, preventDefault, stopPropagation - Visual states: role="group" container for hover pseudo - Branch coverage: `productName` → `name` → empty string fallback paths  All commerce SDK hooks are properly mocked — no live API calls in tests.

cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh all "test(storefront): add unit tests for product-quick-view components ↵ - QuickViewModal: 14 tests covering modal shell, cont
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:complete product-quick-view storefront-unit-test
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark storefront-unit-test complete"
